slug: eclipse_route7

# Unique identifier for this encounter
slug: "example-horde-encounter"

# Encounter type is HORDE (multiple monsters together)
encounter_type: horde

# Horde definition
horde:
  monsters:
    - monster: "pairagrin"       # First monster in the horde
      encounter_rate: 0.5           # 50% chance within the horde composition
      held_items:
        - item_slug: "potion"
          probability: 0.4
      level_range: [2, 4]
      variables:
        - key: stage_of_day
          value: "night"
      exp_req_mod: 1.0

    - monster: "nut"      # Second monster in the horde
      encounter_rate: 0.3
      held_items:
        - item_slug: "potion"
          probability: 0.2
      level_range: [3, 5]
      variables:
        - key: stage_of_day
          value: "night"
      exp_req_mod: 1.5

    - monster: "rockitten"       # Third monster in the horde
      encounter_rate: 0.2
      held_items:
        - item_slug: "potion"
          probability: 0.1
      level_range: [5, 7]
      variables:
        - key: stage_of_day
          value: "night"
      exp_req_mod: 2.0

  horde_level_range: [3, 6]         # Base level range for the entire horde
  horde_exp_mod: 1.3                # Horde XP modifier (30% more XP)

# Zone-level scaling options
scaling_zone: false                 # Scaling disabled for this zone
scale_offset_range: null            # No scaling offset
scale_multiplier: 1.0               # Default multiplier
override_level_range: false         # Do not override monster level ranges

# Unique identifier for this encounter
slug: "example-encounter"

# Encounter type is SINGLE (only one monster at a time)
encounter_type: single

# List of monsters that can appear in this encounter
monsters:
  - monster: "pairagrin"          # Slug of the monster
    encounter_rate: 0.6             # 60% chance to encounter this monster
    held_items:                     # Items the monster may hold
      - item_slug: "potion"      # Slug of the item
        probability: 0.25           # 25% chance the Pairagrin holds this item
    level_range: [3, 5]             # Pairagrin appears between level 3 and 5
    variables:                      # Variables affecting encounter
      - key: stage_of_day
        value: "night"              # Example: only appears at night
    exp_req_mod: 1.2                # 20% more XP required to defeat
    level_offset: 1                 # Pairagrin level is shifted +1
    min_player_level: 2             # Player must be at least level 2
    max_player_level: 10            # Player must be at most level 10
    scaling_enabled: true           # Enable scaling with party average
    override_level_range: false     # Do not override declared level range
    scaling_offset_range: [-1, 2]   # Random offset applied when scaling

# Zone-level scaling options
scaling_zone: true                  # Zone applies scaling to all monsters
scale_offset_range: [-2, 3]         # Zone-wide scaling offset
scale_multiplier: 1.0               # No multiplier applied
override_level_range: false         # Do not override monster level ranges
